Description:
Upgrades <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Blood of the Dragon<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> to <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Life of the Dragon<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.
<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Life of the Dragon Effect: <UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>Increases damage dealt by 15%
Upon successfully landing <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Geirskogul<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, grants 3 stacks of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Nastrond Ready<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.
<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration: <UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>20s

Upgrades <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Blood of the Dragon<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> to <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Life of the Dragon<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.
<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Life of the Dragon Effect: <UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>Increases damage dealt by 15%
Upon successfully landing <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Geirskogul<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, grants <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Nastrond Ready<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.
